description: A White House graphic built on a photograph with an overlaid headline banner. The full-bleed photo shows President Donald Trump seated at a desk in the White House (a hall setting with American flags behind) signing a document with a black pen, his left hand flat on an open leather portfolio; the round Seal of the President of the United States ('SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES') is engraved on the desk front at right. Surrounding and behind him, leaning in and smiling, is a crowd of girls and young women, several in athletic and cheerleading attire (one red-and-white cheer uniform reads 'SOUTH,' another wears 'Under Armour' gear). Across the lower third is a black banner with a red-bracketed 'DAILY CALLER' logo and, in light serif text, the headline 'Trump Admin Bars Visas From Men Competing In Women's Sports'. The White House wordmark and emblem are centered at the bottom. The tweet text reads 'Women's sports are for WOMEN'.
notable_text: DAILY CALLER; Trump Admin Bars Visas From Men Competing In Women's Sports; The WHITE HOUSE
